mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract (recruitment_id, company_email, freelancer_email, status) VALUES (#{recruitmentId}, #{companyEmail}, #{freelancerEmail}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM contract WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND (company_email = #{email} OR freelancer_email = #{email})

SELECT c.contract_id, c.status, c.company_email, c.freelancer_email, comp.company_name AS company_name, u.name AS freelancer_name, r.title AS recruitment_title, r.recruitment_id, cd.contract_start_date, cd.contract_end_date, cd.total_wage FROM contract c JOIN recruitment r ON c.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id JOIN company comp ON c.company_email = comp.email JOIN user u ON c.freelancer_email = u.email LEFT JOIN contract_document cd ON cd.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE (c.company_email = #{email} OR c.freelancer_email = #{email})
AND c.status = #{status}
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.contract_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contract c JOIN recruitment r ON c.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id JOIN company comp ON c.company_email = comp.email JOIN user u ON c.freelancer_email = u.email WHERE (c.company_email = #{email} OR c.freelancer_email = #{email})
AND c.status = #{status}
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT c.contract_id AS contractId, c.status, c.company_email AS companyEmail, c.freelancer_email AS freelancerEmail, comp.company_name AS companyName, u.name AS freelancerName, r.title AS recruitmentTitle, r.recruitment_id AS recruitmentId, r.recruitment_category AS recruitmentCategory, r.job_category AS jobCategory, r.summary, r.content, r.budget, r.contract_start_at AS contractStartAt, r.contract_end_at AS contractEndAt, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM contract c JOIN recruitment r ON c.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id JOIN company comp ON c.company_email = comp.email JOIN user u ON c.freelancer_email = u.email WHERE c.freelancer_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'PROPOSAL'
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contract c JOIN recruitment r ON c.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id JOIN company comp ON c.company_email = comp.email JOIN user u ON c.freelancer_email = u.email WHERE c.freelancer_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'PROPOSAL'
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR comp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT c.contract_id, c.recruitment_id, c.company_email, c.freelancer_email, c.status, r.title AS recruitment_title, cr.chat_room_id FROM contract c JOIN recruitment r ON c.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE c.contract_id = #{contractId}
SELECT cd.contract_id FROM contract_document cd JOIN contract c ON cd.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND cd.contract_end_date < CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM contract WHERE (company_email = #{email} OR freelancer_email = #{email}) AND status IN ('WAITING','NEGOTIATING_A','NEGOTIATING_B','NEGOTIATING_C','IN_PROGRESS')
